Enum esriGeodatabaseVersion

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Geodatabase Version.

[Guid("BFE2A8A0-6B46-4305-8B4B-7C5EB0C9C000")]
public enum esriGeodatabaseVersion

Fields

esriGeodatabaseFutureVersion = 99999

99999: Special value to handle future version of Geodatabase.

esriGeodatabaseVersion10 = 0

0: Requires a 10.0 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion101 = 1

1: Requires a 10.1 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion102 = 2

2: Requires a 10.2 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion1021 = 3

3: Requires a 10.2.1 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion121 = 4

4: Requires a 12.1 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion123 = 5

5: Requires a 12.3 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion124 = 6

6: Requires a 12.4 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion125 = 7

7: Requires a 12.5 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion126 = 8

8: Requires a 12.6 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion127 = 9

9: Requires a 12.7 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion128 = 10

10: Requires a 12.8 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion129 = 11

11: Requires a 12.9 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion130 = 12

12: Requires a 13.0 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion131 = 13

13: Requires a 13.1 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion132 = 14

14: Requires a 13.2 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion133 = 15

15: Requires a 13.3 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion134 = 16

16: Requires a 13.4 or newer client.

esriGeodatabaseVersion135 = 17

17: Requires a 13.5 or newer client.

18: Requires a 13.6 or newer client.
